name: claude-dashboard
description: Beautiful local dashboard for Claude Code usage — 5-hour blocks, weekly trends, model breakdown, tool usage and an activity heatmap, read straight from your ~/.claude logs.
author: Iftah Saar (https://iftah.dev)

scripts.//docker:up: Rebuild image from current code and (re)start the container in the background. Run this after any code change.
scripts.//docker:down: Stop and remove the running container.
scripts.//docker:logs: Follow the container logs live (Ctrl+C to stop watching; container keeps running).
